title: cynodon dactylon var. septentrionalis
intro: Cynodon dactylon var. septentrionalis, also known as northern Bermuda grass, is a variant of the common Bermuda grass that is native to the Northern Hemisphere. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Cynodon dactylon var. septentrionalis include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and treating skin infections, among others. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for its medicinal uses, or dried and used in poultices and topical applications.
